Tree is easy to miss even with fruit on it. Delicious, very sweet, no sour, juicy, lovely texture. Ready in late September. A little hard to find ones that aren't bug-eaten, but worth the hunt. Definitely wash them good bc next to busy road.

Two trees right next to each other. The one on the left, next to the concrete cube has large, delicious, sweet apples (ping-pong sized) There are other crabapple trees along this road, but this is easily the best one. Access: Public.
